How is everyone doing today? In this video I wanted to walk you through getting the challenge tracking doc that we've made. So below this video there's going to be a button. When you click on this button it's going to take you to this Google Docs copy document. It says would you like to make a copy? Go ahead and hit that blue make a copy button. When you do it's going to make a copy of this challenge tracking doc and put it onto your Google Drive so you own it. So what I recommend first is go ahead and click up here at the top left and name it whatever you want. You're doing a pretty good detox or maybe you have a different name for this challenge. Go ahead and rename the document so you can get it to work. And then use this challenge tracking doc to track all of the links and URLs that you've got in the challenge. That way you have it all in one play. If you fill this in as you go it's going to make it a lot easier if you need to make changes later. If you're going to use this as a basis for a new challenge just to make sure you don't find these things later on. Hope you enjoyed this video make sure you use this document and I hope you have a great rest of your day.
